items.claim: Fatima Klein's defensive wrestling needs improvement.
items.quote: I understand her wrestling still needs a little bit of work. I believe in her grappling needs some work as well

items.claim: Fatima Klein is capable of beating every fighter in the top 15 of the strawweight division in a pure striking fight, excluding Zhang Weili and Yan Xiaonan.
items.quote: in pure striking fights she's beating a lot of fighters at 115 and I would argue she beats every fighter in the top 15 in a pure striking fight except for potentially Zhang Weili and Yan Xiaonan.

items.claim: Chase Hooper is fighting too soon after suffering a knockout loss.
items.quote: I don't love the fact that he's fighting so soon after getting knocked out against Lance Gibson.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has been easily knocked down in his last two fights.
items.quote: he is getting chinned over and over and over again. I don't want to say Chase Hooper is doing what he used to do early in his career and that was he would block punches with his face, but man, he's gotten chinned quite easily in his last two fights.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez is vulnerable to takedowns, as evidenced by Thiago Moises and Mike Davis successfully taking him down.
items.quote: we saw both Moises and Davis find success in taking down Ramirez.

items.claim: Chase Hooper's 6'1" frame makes it difficult for him to consistently cut down to 155 pounds.
items.quote: The guy's 6'1 and it's going to continue to be hard to cut down to 155 consistently at 6'1" tall.

items.claim: Chase Hooper possesses high-level control and pressure on the ground.
items.quote: the control that Hooper can keep and the pressure that he can keep on the ground is very high level as well.
